title: IONS India 2020 — Abstract Submission Promotion
subtitle: To encourage students to participate in IONS India 2020 by promoting abstract submissions and research engagement in optics and photonics.
description: BVP OSA (now BVP OPTICA) promoted the International OSA Network of Students (IONS) India 2020 event held at IIT Delhi from 29 February to 2 March 2020. The initiative aimed to spread awareness about the event and motivate students to submit research abstracts and take part in a global academic platform focused on optics and photonics.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Promotion of Call for Papers / abstract submission
Sharing event details through social media outreach
Encouraging student participation in research-focused discussions
Event hosted at IIT Delhi (29 Feb – 2 Mar 2020)
Participation opportunity alongside global optics communities
Talks and sessions by multiple international speakers
